items.name: MetaTap Company
items.description: MetaTap is a game publishing and PR & marketing agency, specializing in co-publishing and KOL/KOC campaigns. I gained one year of hands-on experience in game programming and operations, contributing to product development and live game management.

items.name: National ROBOG 2024 Competition
items.description: Secured 3rd place in the National ROBOG 2024 Competition – the first AI humanoid robot arena in Vietnam. This achievement demonstrates strong capabilities in artificial intelligence, robotics engineering, and competitive problem-solving.

items.name: Robot at Nguyen Hue Tet Festival 2025
items.description: Collaborated with a team to design and develop a humanoid robot showcased at Nguyen Hue Tet Festival 2025 in Ho Chi Minh City. The project attracted significant public interest and was featured across multiple media outlets.

items.name: TFY Company
items.description: TFY is a technology and education company focused on building innovative, real-world solutions. I contributed to multiple projects and currently serve as Director, leading business strategy and technology development to deliver data-driven products.

items.name: LINKWORK Company
items.description: LINKWORK is a company specializing in media, education, and career development, connecting individuals with learning resources and employment opportunities. I am responsible for system design and development, contributing to scalable, technology-driven solutions that empower learners and job seekers.

items.name: HUFLIT University
items.description: HUFLIT University is a leading institution in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. I am currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, where I have built a strong foundation in programming, software engineering, and data science, while achieving multiple academic awards.
